---
name: Recommendation rule proposal
about: Suggest a new cost or performance recommendation rule
title: "[Rule]: "
labels: recommendation, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Rule description

What should AgenticLens detect or recommend?

## Current behavior

What does AgenticLens report today for this scenario?

## Expected recommendation

What insight or optimization should be surfaced?

## Why this matters

Explain the cost savings, performance improvement, or observability use case this addresses.

## Suggested logic or thresholds

If you have a proposed detection rule, threshold, or heuristic, describe it here.
